Studio Admin

Enter your password to manage site images.

First time? Default password is riya-admin — change it after you log in.

Studio Admin · manage images
⏳ Loading your website file (index.html)…

Swap any image on your website, then download the updated index.html and re-upload to your hosting.

How this works:
  1. Keep this riya-admin.html file in the same folder as your index.html.
  2. Upload a photo (or paste an image URL) for any slot below.
  3. Click Save draft to keep your changes on this device.
  4. Click Preview to see what the live site will look like.
  5. Click ⬇ Download index.html to get the updated website file.
  6. Upload that file to Hostinger / Netlify, replacing the old one.

Image tip: uploaded photos get auto-compressed. For large galleries, use imgbb.com (free) and paste URLs. This admin file stays on your computer — never upload it to your hosting.

Hero photos

The three images shown next to the headline at the top of the page.
